scripts.copy-bootstrap: mkdir -p public/assets/css public/assets/js public/assets/bootstrap/css public/assets/bootstrap/js public/assets/jquery && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css public/assets/bootstrap/css/bootstrap.min.css && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js public/assets/bootstrap/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js && cp node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js public/assets/jquery/jquery.min.js
